definition: codes used for designating hazard statements with respect to physical, health and environmental hazards emanating from the substance according to the type of risk involved

definition_ml.en: codes used for designating hazard statements with respect to physical, health and environmental hazards emanating from the substance according to the type of risk involved
definition_ml.de: Codes, die für Angaben benutzt werden zum Art des Risikos bezüglich physikalischer Gefahren und Gefahren betreffend Gesundheit und Umwelt benutzt werden, die von Substanzen ausgehen

source_document: UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods, 18th Ed. 2013, Part 3
note: 1 The hazard class of a substance cannot be derived from its UN number and needs to be looked up in UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods.  , 2 Hazard class codes are associated with pictograms for marking package of goods during transport and storage.

note_ml.en: 1 The hazard class of a substance cannot be derived from its UN number and needs to be looked up in UNECE Regulations on the transport of dangerous goods.  , 2 Hazard class codes are associated with pictograms for marking package of goods during transport and storage.
note_ml.de: 1. Die Gefahrklasse einer Substanz kann nicht von ihrer UN-Nummer abgeleitet werden und muss in den UNECE-Regularien zu Transport von gefährlichen Güter nachgeschlagen werden. , 2. Gefahrenklassencodes besitzen Piktogramme, um die Verpackung von Gütern während Transport und Lagerung zu kennzeichnen.
